# Magic Missile

- **Level**: 1
- **School**: Evocation
- **Casting Time**: 1 action
- **Range**: 120 feet
- **Components**: V, S
- **Duration**: Instantaneous
- **Classes**: Sorcerer, Wizard

## Description

You create three glowing darts of magical force.  Each dart hits a
creature of your choice that you can see within range.  A dart deals
1d4+1 force damage to its target.  The darts all strike simultaneously,
and you can direct them at one target or several.

## At Higher Levels

When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher,
the spell creates one more dart for each slot level above 1st.

## Tactical Notes

- **No attack roll, no saving throw**: Magic Missile always hits.
  This makes it the reliable finisher against evasive targets (high
  AC, Shield spell reactions, Blink) and the only way to break
  concentration through a purely defensive statblock.
- **Damage simultaneity rule**: All three darts roll damage together
  and apply at the same instant.  Per Sage Advice, this means a single
  Constitution save against concentration, not three separate ones.
- **Force damage**: Almost nothing resists force damage.  Useful
  against creatures immune or resistant to fire, cold, lightning,
  and poison.

## Cross-References

- See `shield.md` for the reaction that blocks Magic Missile.  The
  Shield spell explicitly creates an invisible barrier of magical
  force that intercepts Magic Missile darts.
